assignments.name: Assign_add_spans_FY_to_Stages
assignments.label: Assign add spans FY to Stages

assignments.name: Assign_next_version_to_batch_for_edit
assignments.label: Assign next version to batch for edit

decisions.name: Is_the_Current_User_a_Grant_Recipient_Lead
decisions.label: Is the Current User a Grant Recipient Lead

decisions.description: remove the formula false condition to reenable the screen
decisions.name: Was_A_New_Version
decisions.label: does the edited batch have a previous version

Flow.description: Portal Screen that lists out all batches that are in the status passed, and provides a detailed overview of a batch when selected, also allows Grant Recipients to take actions on a batch moving the batch on in the process

formulas.description: For some reason you cannot access the flow user id from a component visibility so hence this
formulas.name: UserId

Flow.label: ABS FORM - Batch List and Edit

fields.name: Baseline_Error_Text
fields.fieldText: No Award Baseline was found for this funding award, please inform your PSO

fields.name: Total_Grant_Spent
fields.fieldText: Total grant funding already spent on homes via upfront funding

fields.name: OOEPGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: PR100EPGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: PR50EPGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: SHEPGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: OOLCHGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: PR100LCHGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: PR50LCHGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: SHLCHGrant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: Grant Per House All Approved + Current

fields.name: Has_non_recoverable_VAT_been_paid
fields.fieldText: Has non recoverable VAT been paid?

fields.name: PleaseConfirmTitle
fields.fieldText: Please confirm the deletion of batch, {!BatchTable.firstSelectedRow.LA_Identifier__c}

fields.name: IDDisplay
fields.fieldText:
{!refetchNewBatchVersion.LA_Identifier__c}

Version {!refetchNewBatchVersion.Version_Number__c}

fields.name: BatchCostsIncreased
fields.fieldText: The Batch's Total Grant Requested Amount compared to the previous version

fields.name: Batch_Cost_Change_Justification
fields.fieldText: Please summarise the changes made to this batch, and please provide reasoning if costs have increased

value.stringValue: A new version of the Batch has been created.
Assign LAs,Batch Delivery Completion,Property Information,Measures,Capital Expenditure,VAT,Summary,Validation
